examples: It'd be up to me to try, sir. I'd do my best: wouldn't we, Nellie?
She complains endlessly about Nellie Boxall, who succeeds Sophie as her cook.
If I were you, I would not tell Nellie you saw her husband having lunch with another woman.
Mr Wolstencroft said "Nellie" was probably Pte Wolstencroft's sister Ellen, who was known as Nellie.
The card was sent to Private Edward Wolstencroft of the Royal Fusiliers by a woman called Nellie in April 1915.
